# Minnesota Facts

Minnesota is a state in the upper midwestern United States. Its largest city is
Minneapolis, which together with the neighboring capital, Saint Paul, forms the
Twin Cities metropolitan area.

## Geography

Minnesota is known as the Land of 10,000 Lakes. The actual count of lakes ten
acres or larger is closer to 11,842. The Mississippi River begins at Lake Itasca
in the northern part of the state.

## Climate

Minnesota winters are long and cold. International Falls, on the Canadian border,
is often the coldest spot in the lower 48 states and bills itself as the Icebox
of the Nation.
